status: Fixed in taskflow close atomicity lane
finding: `taskflow close` dry-run can report `writeReadinessHint.status: ready`, but the identical `--write` command then fails with `ATM_TASKFLOW_CLOSE_PLANNING_PATH_MISSING` for a stale `source.planPath`, even when the task is `closureAuthority: target_repo` and has no `planningMirrorPaths`.
expectedBehavior: Dry-run readiness must include every blocker that `--write` will enforce, or target-repo-only tasks with no planning mirror should not fail write because a non-authoritative historical planning path is missing.
evidenceOrRepro: During `TASK-AAO-0147`, `node atm.mjs taskflow close --task TASK-AAO-0147 --actor codex-captain --historical-delivery cda5705 --json` returned ready, but the `--write` form failed because `atm-agent-first-operability/tasks/TASK-AAO-0147-main-push-audit-baseline-repair.task.md` was missing. The source fix in `packages/cli/src/commands/taskflow/write-readiness.ts` treats stale/unresolvable source plan paths as advisory for target-repo-authority tasks without planning mirrors, so dry-run and write share the same closeback-path policy.
followUp: Keep `packages/cli/src/commands/taskflow/__tests__/write-readiness.spec.ts` and `validate-taskflow-close-atomicity` coverage proving dry-run/write closeback-path parity.
